fields.description:
The selected field will be updated with this value.
  • For Date field types, you can enter Today to enable updating to the current date when the trigger fires
  • For Time and DateTime field types, you can enter Now to enable updating with the current timestamp when this trigger fires
  • For Select field types, ensure that the value specified here is a valid choice
fields.label: Update Value

name: Engagement Trigger Update Form Field Item
